commands.review_summary:
The PR removes result-count copy from the skills browse toolbar, relocates the List/Grid toggle into the page header, preserves Clear for filtered states, and expands focused UI tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes a deliberate UI presentation choice rather than fixing a reproducible runtime failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is identified; the remaining action is explicit maintainer UX approval after the contributor supplies inspectable visual proof.

target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the `/skills` toolbar count copy entirely instead of showing a loaded-result count.
- Move the List/Grid view toggle into the same header row as the `Skills` title/count, above the skills search input.
- Keep the Clear control available for search/category/featured filtered states.
- Add coverage for empty, paginated browse, search pagination, category-filtered states, and the view-toggle/search/header order.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/styles.css`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- Local browser check at `http://127.0.0.1:3000/skills`: List/Grid renders in the same header row as `Skills 0`, search remains below, no `loaded` or `results` count copy, and no horizontal overflow.

## UI Proof

- Local screenshots saved at `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-inline-mobile.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-inline-desktop-short.png`, and `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-inline-desktop.png`.
target.author: jesse-merhi
